title: phlegmariurus columnaris
intro: Phlegmariurus columnaris, also known as the columnar walking fern, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family, a group of club mosses. It is native to Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus columnaris include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin infections.
